title: diervilla × hybrida
intro: Diervilla × hybrida, also known as the hybrid bush honeysuckle, is a deciduous shrub that is a hybrid of Diervilla lonicera and Lonicera dioica. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Diervilla × hybrida is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in wound healing. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
